recommendations.title: Restraint
recommendations.overview: Two fugitives land in hot water when they take a hostage who poses a threat to their well-being.

recommendations.title: Beyond Infinity: Buzz and the Journey to Lightyear
recommendations.overview: Explore the evolution of Buzz Lightyear from toy to human in the making of Pixar’s Lightyear. Dive into the origin and cultural impact of everyone’s favorite Space Ranger, the art of designing a new “human Buzz,” and the challenges faced by the Light

recommendations.title: Toy Story
recommendations.overview: Led by Woody, Andy's toys live happily in his room until Andy's birthday brings Buzz Lightyear onto the scene. Afraid of losing his place in Andy's heart, Woody plots against Buzz. But when circumstances separate Buzz and Woody from their owner, the

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me
recommendations.overview: After learning that a boy their age has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four boys decide to go see the body. Gordie, Vern, Chris, and Teddy encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, but they also learn more about one ano

recommendations.title: Small Fry
recommendations.overview: A fast food restaurant mini variant of Buzz forcibly switches places with the real Buzz and his friends have to deal with the obnoxious impostor.

recommendations.title: Thelma
recommendations.overview: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

recommendations.title: When I'm Young
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old Malena gets a second chance at life when she magically turns into her 22-year-old self. Now, posing as "Maria" to hide her true identity, she becomes the lead singer of her grandson's band and tries to recover her dream of singing, which

recommendations.title: Treasure Hunters: On the Tracks of Khufu
recommendations.overview: An eccentric archaeologist goes on an unexpected journey to find King Khufu's lost treasure with his daughter and grandson.

recommendations.title: Elemental
recommendations.overview: In a city where fire, water, land and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy will discover something elemental: how much they have in common.
